reasoning: The control AU-4(1) focuses on ensuring sufficient audit log storage capacity and the ability to transfer logs to alternate storage. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are configured with adequate storage capacity, that there is a mechanism to transfer logs to external storage (e.g., centralized logging solutions), and that retention policies are defined to manage log lifecycle.
